reviews.comment:
Excelente atención aunque sea una estación muy concurrida

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service even though it is a very busy station

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio con el coche en cubierto al lado de la habitación y muy buena atención envel desayuno

(Translated by Google)
Very clean with the car covered next to the room and very good service and breakfast
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXX2ItMDN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísima atención, estuve media hora por reloj esperando que atendieran a dos autos delante mío, me tuve que limpiar el vidrio sólo ya que el playero se fue mientras se cargaba el combustible, solicitar dos veces el ticket. No paro nunca más a cargar ahí

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I waited half an hour for two cars in front of me to be served. I had to clean the window myself because the gas station attendant left while I was pumping gas. I'll never stop to pump gas there again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXX2QyWjJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos en los dormís y la verdad todo impecable, excelente atención también, el desayuno que te dan es bueno, sobre todo las medialunas!

(Translated by Google)
We stopped at the dorms and everything was spotless, the service was excellent, and the breakfast they gave us was good, especially the croissants!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXM2JYQ3NBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the silversmiths who showed me how to pay using the Servi Club app.
